# ISUD PARAMETERS

# warm start                   = PRE_SOLUTION
# Zoom max MIP Inc. degree     = 2
# max CP Inc. degree           = 10
# use Multi stage              = false
# min ISUD improvement         = 0.0
# is Zooming used              = false
# Column added to MP           = 40

# Use Truncated Labeling       = true

# Release Dominance Rule       = false
# Restrict outgoing arcs       = false
# Is Pickup allowed after Drop  = false
# Restrict Route Length        = NUM_PICK_RESTRICTED

# SubProblem solution Method   = LABEL_SETTING
# portion of constraints for MP  = false
# use greedy for vehicle portion  = false
# use zones for vehicle portion  = false
# number of pickups is limited  = true
# number of pickups allowed    = 4
# Sorting mode of paths        = PATH_SCORE  
# Sorting mode of columns      = REDUCED_COST

# CPLEX PARAMETERS
#

# solve Time Limit             = 300
# populate Time Limit          = 200
# MIP Gap                      = 0
